action_set_definitions.name: get_clinical_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental state including patient vitals, status, and cumulative toxicity.

action_set_definitions.name: measure_lesion_depth
action_set_definitions.description: Performs diagnostic testing on a specific tooth to determine the internal depth of a lesion.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_anesthesia
action_set_definitions.description: Applies anesthetic to the patient to manage pain and procedural stability.

method.description: The type of anesthesia strategy to employ.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_dentin_engagement
action_set_definitions.description: Proceeds with the preparation/excavation of dentin. This action triggers physiological responses visible in vitals.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_pulp_protection
action_set_definitions.description: Applies specialized pulp-protection protocol for deep lesions prior to impressions.

action_set_definitions.name: place_direct_restoration
action_set_definitions.description: Places direct composite restoration on designated teeth.

action_set_definitions.name: capture_definitive_impression
action_set_definitions.description: Captures the final impression for indirect crown preparation.

state_description.patient_vitals: Current physiological vitals of the patient.
state_description.disease_metrics: Internal markers of disease progression not directly visible without testing.
state_description.cumulative_toxicity: Aggregate level of physical strain/toxicity from treatments (0-100 scale).
state_description.treatment_history: List of all actions previously executed on this patient.
state_description.patient_status: The general physiological classification of the patient.
